scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter client test && pnpm --filter server test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter client lint && pnpm --filter server lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter client typecheck && pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter shared typecheck
